title: #AIS: Pear VC's Mar Hershenson on making successful founders
description:
This talk was recorded LIVE at the All-In Summit in Miami and included slides. To watch on YouTube, check out our All-In Summit playlist: https://bit.ly/aisytplaylist

0:00 Pear VC Founding Managing Partner Mar Hershenson gives a talk on making successful entrepreneurs: can great founders be created, or is it something they are born with?

17:04 Bestie Q&A with Mar: Catalyzing great founders, why the PayPal Mafia created more unicorns than early Google employees, creating more opportunity for underrepresented founders, inducing failure & more

analysis.summary: Mar Hershenson, Founding Managing Partner of Pear VC, discusses making successful entrepreneurs and whether great founders can be created or are born with it. The talk covers catalyzing great founders and creating more opportunities for underrepresented founders. The conversation also touches on inducing failure and its role in the development of successful entrepreneurs.

takeaways.text: PayPal Mafia created more unicorns than early Google employees
Failure is a crucial part of the learning process
Diverse founding teams can lead to more success
Mentorship and support are essential for founder development

sentiment.notes: The conversation is focused on creating and supporting successful founders, with a positive tone and emphasis on opportunities for underrepresented groups.

notable_moments.description: Mar Hershenson begins her talk on making successful entrepreneurs
Bestie Q&A with Mar Hershenson starts
